ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flag_states" (
  "flag_state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag state */,
  "flag_name" TEXT /* Name of the flag state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the flag state is located */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of flag state (e.g., country, territory) */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the flag state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the flag state */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., democracy, monarchy) */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the flag state */,
  "maritime_law_strength" INTEGER /* Rating of the strength of maritime laws (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "flag_state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flag state being inspected */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who conducted the inspection */,
  "vessel_id" TEXT /* ID of the vessel that was inspected */,
  "vessel_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "inspection_type" TEXT /* Type of inspection (e.g., routine, special) */,
  "inspection_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the inspection in minutes */,
  "number_of_deficiencies" INTEGER /* Number of deficiencies found during the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_flag_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("flag_state_id") REFERENCES flag_states ("flag_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detentions" (
  "detention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detention */,
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspection that led to the detention */,
  "detention_date" TEXT /* Date of the detention */,
  "detention_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the detention */,
  "detention_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the detention in days */,
  "detention_fine" REAL /* Fine imposed for the detention */,
  "detention_location" TEXT /* Location where the detention occurred */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for follow-up inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detentions_inspection_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_id") REFERENCES inspections ("inspection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "flag_state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flag state being evaluated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the metrics are calculated */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for which the metrics are calculated */,
  "number_of_inspections" INTEGER /* Number of inspections conducted on the flag state */,
  "number_of_deficiencies" INTEGER /* Number of deficiencies found during inspections */,
  "number_of_detentions" INTEGER /* Number of detentions issued to the flag state */,
  "detention_percentage" REAL /* Detention percentage for the flag state */,
  "average_inspection_duration" REAL /* Average duration of inspections */,
  "average_deficiencies_per_inspection" REAL /* Average number of deficiencies per inspection */,
  "average_detention_duration" REAL /* Average duration of detentions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_flag_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("flag_state_id") REFERENCES flag_states ("flag_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., inspector, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level (1-5) with 5 being the highest */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
